scripts.build:cli: cargo build --bin functor-runner && wasm-pack build runtime/functor-runtime-web --target=web && cargo build --bin functor
scripts.build:oculus: ANDROID_HOME=${ANDROID_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/share/android-sdk} CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-android cargo ndk -t arm64-v8a build --manifest-path runtime/functor-runtime-oculus/Cargo.toml
scripts.test:golden: npm run fetch:assets && cargo test -p functor-runtime-desktop --test golden -- --ignored --nocapture
